ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrency_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency pair */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency of the pair */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* Quote currency of the pair */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency pair (e.g., OP/ETH) */,
  "base_currency_decimals" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the base currency */,
  "quote_currency_decimals" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the quote currency */,
  "min_order_quantity" REAL /* Minimum quantity for an order */,
  "max_order_quantity" REAL /* Maximum quantity for an order */,
  "min_order_amount" REAL /* Minimum amount for an order */,
  "max_order_amount" REAL /* Maximum amount for an order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency pair */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the pair */,
  "volume_24h" TEXT /* 24-hour trading volume with percentage change */,
  "liquidity_2pct" TEXT /* Liquidity within ±2% of the current price with percentage change */,
  "market_depth" TEXT /* Market depth with buy and sell volumes */,
  "market_info" TEXT /* Market information (e.g., trade now) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency pair */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the trade */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade was executed */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "fee_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrency_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view market data) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price entry */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency pair */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the pair */,
  "volume_24h" TEXT /* 24-hour trading volume with percentage change */,
  "liquidity_2pct" TEXT /* Liquidity within ±2% of the current price with percentage change */,
  "market_depth" TEXT /* Market depth with buy and sell volumes */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the historical data entry */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Time interval (e.g., 1m, 5m, 1h, 1d) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis entry */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency pair */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., trend analysis, volatility) */,
  "analysis_data" TEXT /* Data and insights from the analysis */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the analysis */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Time interval (e.g., 1m, 5m, 1h, 1d) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset (e.g., cryptocurrency, fiat) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the asset */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
